title: Welcome to Charak Diagnostics Centre
heading: Welcome
text:
Welcome to Charak Diagnostics Centre Enquiry Us charak1984@gmail.com Emergency 9305-5482-77 Tollfree No. 8688-360-360 Appointments 8400-8888-44 0 Close Health Packages Home About us About us Vision & Mission Our Team Pathology Haematology Biochemistry Immunology Histopathology Cytology Bone Marrow Microbiology Molecular Lab Radiology CT-Scan CT-Angiography Digital X-Ray Ultrasound Mammography Fibro Scan PG/IOP Dental IVP HSG BMD Nuclear Medicine Pet CT Gamma Camera Other Facilities PFT EEG Endoscopy Colonoscopy Cardiac 2D Echo TMT ECG Holter Monitoring Health Packages Cardiac Tests CT Scan H Doppler Health check-up MRI Pathology Registration Sonography Sonography H X-Ray Gallery Contact us Book for Sample Collection at HOME Check Patient Reports PET-CT & GAMMA CAMERA SCAN Welcome to Charak Diagnostic Center, Chowk A vision to strengthen healthcare in the communities we serve and empower patients to make informed choices, was at the genesis of Charak Diagnostic & Medical Research Institute. Inaugurated in January 2000, the Center is a significant social initiative from Charak Group. It is designed to raise India's global standing as a healthcare destination, with emphasis on excellence in clinical services, diagnostic facilities and research activities. We are the only Diagnostic center in Lucknow to function with a FULL TIME SPECIALIST SYSTEM, that ensures the availability and access to the best medical talent around-the-clock. Our Vision To be nationally respected for excellence in patient care and most trusted for personalized coordinated care of the patients.
